title: Moderation Update: April 19, 2026
body:
## Community Moderation Summary

The following actions were taken following review of high-severity reports:

**Bans Enacted (2):**
- @spam_wave_42 — Removed for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes
- @toxic_runner — Removed for repeated targeted harassment against community newcomers

**False Positive Dismissed (1):**
- @core_maintainer — Report was determined to be a brigading incident; no action taken

All related reports have been closed. The remaining medium and low-severity reports are queued for review.

— Community Operations Team
